description.description: Natural-language brief for a typed Pi Protocol package with public provides. This builder is not for arbitrary Pi TUI/bootstrap behavior or live extension-loading interception, but typed next-session settings-manager packages remain in scope.

brief.description: Alias for description with the same typed protocol-package scope.

repoDir.description: Repository or package directory that should receive the build. Defaults to the current working directory when omitted.

applyChanges.description: When true, write files to the target path and attempt target-path runtime verification. When false, keep the build in dry-run mode and return source_validated after staged verification.
